name: two-pass reconciler rejects a subagent classification whose label is not in the allowed five-label vocabulary
command: printf '{"classification":"superseded"}\n' > sub.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-classification.sh" --classification sub.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_label=superseded' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
